payload.answer: Treat this as a duplicate Slack delivery for the same event ID; do not create duplicate downstream records for the same message context.

entity_resolution.reason: Input provides only context and does not supply definitive IDs for individuals beyond names; avoid persisting uncertain identity resolution.

memory_cards.statement: Same Slack event ID (slack_retry_event_001__context) was delivered twice for a message about: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.

details: Deduplication decision made based on same event ID delivered twice.
